---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new signal, research lane, or platform improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

A brief description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What research gap or operational pain point does it address?

## Proposed Approach

How should this be implemented? Reference relevant modules or research desk docs.

## Research-Only Check

- [ ] This feature does not touch live execution or approval queues
- [ ] This feature preserves the zero-usable-rows / no-sizing / no-execution guardrails

## Acceptance Criteria

What does "done" look like for this feature?
